# Good Measure Giving

> [Good Measure Giving](https://goodmeasuregiving.org) is an evidence-based evaluations platform of Muslim charities based on Impact, Confidence, and Zakat Alignment.

## Core Resources
- [Browse Charities](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/browse) - Search and filter 160+ Muslim charities.
- [Our Methodology](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/methodology) - Detailed evaluation process, impact scores, confidence metrics, and Zakat verification standards.
- [FAQ](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/faq) - Frequently asked questions about our process, Zakat criteria, and evaluations.
- [About Us](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/about) - The mission, team, and background of the project.
- [AI Transparency](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/prompts) - Our system prompts, raw evaluation criteria, and LLM parameters.

## Tools
- [Zakat Calculator](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/zakat-calculator) - A tool to calculate Zakat across different asset classes.

## Datasets
- [Charities JSON Dataset](https://goodmeasuregiving.org/data/charities.json) - Complete dataset of evaluated charities.
